arts.ttl: Why isn't Weston McKennie playing for Juventus against Aston Villa in the Champions League?
arts.sum: The USMNT was forced to sit out Juventus training on Monday after suffering from muscle fatigue and has not recovered in time to feature for Thiago Motta at Villa Park. Juventus will know that they face a tough test at Villa Park, where a jubilant home crowd watched their team beat Bayern Munich to start the Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: Bigger world clubs are going to be looking at Unai Emery
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa defender James Collins has tipped Unai Emery for new job offers after the Spaniard's achievements in two years at Villa Park. "Any manager that does what Emery has done at Villa is going to be talked about," Collins said.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Juventus sources provide update on the potential chances of Douglas Luiz re-joining Aston Villa
arts.sum: The midfielder has struggled in Italy...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ready to increase offer for January signing – Would go higher than original €18m
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Aston Villa are still interested in Besiktas forward Semih Kılıçsoy. The Premier League side failed in their attempt to sign the youngster during the last transfer window but haven’t been deterred in their pursuit of the Besiktas man. arts.ttl: Monchi 'would always' consider Aston Villa transfer U-Turn
arts.sum: In an interview with Italian outlet Gazzetta dello Sport, Monchi discussed the Brazilian midfielder's qualities and his struggle to adapt to life at new club Juventus, who Villa play in the Champions League on Wednesday evening. "He’s playing less than we all expected, but we’re talking about a strong player," Monchi told Gazzetta dello Sport.

arts.ttl: “In no rush” – Monchi explains Aston Villa have plan in mind for summer signings
arts.sum: Samuel Iling-Junior and Enzo Barrenechea joined Aston Villa from Juventus in the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Club Brugge star says Celtic Champions League rivals must top their Aston Villa win to get anything at Parkhead
arts.sum: But like I said, these are the games that you want to play as a player, and we just have to stay calm, embrace these kind of feelings and just perform on the pitch. And in Milan, but also in the games again against Aston Villa and Dortmund, they were at a very good level.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Juventus: How Champions League football can revive Unai Emery's magic
arts.sum: Aston Villa are without a win in six games across all competitions - but Unai Emery tends to get the best out of his players in European competition.

arts.ttl: Juventus consider loan move for Brighton’s Evan Ferguson
arts.sum: According to reports from Italy, Juventus are considering a move for Brighton’s young striker Evan Ferguson. The 20-year-old Irish international has emerged as a potential loan target for the Bianconeri in the upcoming January transfer window. According to The Telegraph, Brighton are willing to let Ferguson leave on loan this winter. This development has caught the attention of several clubs, including Juventus, who see the young forward as a promising option to bolster their attacking lineup.
